title: Workhorse Electric Vehicles Surpass 20 Million Miles on the Road
text: Workhorse Electric Vehicles surpassed 20 million miles on the road, demonstrating the durability and reliability of their commercial EV fleet. This milestone showcases the practical real-world performance of Workhorse vehicles in commercial operations. The vehicles have been operating in diverse conditions and applications, from FedEx deliveries to municipal fleet operations across multiple states. The achievement validates Workhorse's vehicle design and engineering, with extensive mileage accumulation providing crucial performance data for fleet operators considering EV adoption. The milestone represents significant progress for the company's commercialization efforts and provides confidence in vehicle longevity.
